name: Vitamin D3 5000 IU
shortDescription: Daily vitamin D support for bones and immune health.
description: High-potency vitamin D3 formula designed for daily support of bone strength, immune balance, and overall wellness.
ingredients: Vitamin D3 (cholecalciferol), extra virgin olive oil, softgel capsule.
howToUse: Take 1 softgel daily with a meal or as directed by your healthcare professional.
warnings: Do not exceed the recommended dose. Consult a physician if pregnant, nursing, or taking medication.

name: Omega-3 Fish Oil
shortDescription: EPA and DHA support for heart and brain health.
description: Purified omega-3 fish oil concentrate that delivers essential fatty acids to support cardiovascular, cognitive, and joint health.
ingredients: Fish oil concentrate, gelatin softgel, glycerin, purified water.
warnings: Contains fish. Consult a physician before use if taking blood thinners.

name: Magnesium Glycinate
shortDescription: Gentle magnesium form for muscle recovery and sleep.
description: Chelated magnesium glycinate formula created for relaxation, muscle recovery, and everyday nervous system support.
ingredients: Magnesium glycinate, rice flour, vegetable capsule.
howToUse: Take 2 capsules daily, preferably in the evening.
warnings: Consult a healthcare professional if you have kidney disease or are under medical supervision.

name: Vitamin C 1000
shortDescription: Buffered vitamin C for daily antioxidant support.
description: Daily antioxidant formula with vitamin C to support immune health, collagen production, and recovery from everyday stress.
ingredients: Vitamin C, citrus bioflavonoids, microcrystalline cellulose, tablet coating.
warnings: Keep out of reach of children. Do not use if seal is broken.

name: Zinc Picolinate
shortDescription: Highly absorbable zinc for immune and skin support.
description: Highly bioavailable zinc picolinate formula made for immune resilience, healthy skin, and metabolic support.
ingredients: Zinc picolinate, rice concentrate, vegetable capsule.
howToUse: Take 1 capsule daily with a meal.
warnings: Long-term excessive zinc intake may interfere with copper levels. Use only as directed.
